events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: over-greasing purged the seal because the relube sequence skipped the required low-speed, incremental, monitored grease addition (per SKF/Timken guidance) — this is a sequence violation with resulting installed-defective/degraded seal condition. Marked `fail`/`high` risk; corrective path is stop feed, relieve pressure, clean up, inspect/replace seal, then re-lube correctly with verified grease quantity before continuing.
